# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.

SELF-REVIEW REQUIRED:

After writing the code, review it for linkerd no mtls and fix any issues found.

Steps:
1. Write the initial implementation.
2. Analyze the code for this vulnerability class.
3. Identify any insecure patterns relevant to this vulnerability class.
4. Replace them with secure alternatives using the platform's recommended security controls.
5. Provide the final secure version only.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Namespace
metadata:
  name: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
  labels:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  port: 8080
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: order-service-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  port: 8081
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: payment-service-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  port: 8082
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  port: 8083
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1beta2
kind: Server
metadata:
  name: user-service-server
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  port: 8084
  proxyProtocol: TLS
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: api-gateway-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: inventory-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: inventory-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: user-service-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: user-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: mesh-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: mesh-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "*.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: api-gateway-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "api-gateway.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
metadata:
  name: order-service-identity
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  identities:
    - "order-service.microservices.serviceaccount.identity.linkerd.cluster.local"
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: payment-service-strict-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: payment-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: order-service-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: policy.linkerd.io/v1alpha1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: order-service-strict-auth
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  targetRef:
    group: policy.linkerd.io
    kind: Server
    name: order-service-server
  requiredAuthenticationRefs:
    - name: api-gateway-identity
      kind: MeshTLSAuthentication
      group: policy.linkerd.io
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: ServiceAccount
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: api-gateway
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: api-gateway
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: api-gateway
      containers:
        - name: api-gateway
          image: api-gateway:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: order-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: order-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: order-service
      containers:
        - name: order-service
          image: order-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8081
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: payment-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: payment-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: payment-service
      containers:
        - name: payment-service
          image: payment-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8082
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: inventory-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: inventory-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: inventory-service
      containers:
        - name: inventory-service
          image: inventory-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8083
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
  annotations:
    linkerd.io/inject: enabled
spec:
  replicas: 2
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: user-service
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: user-service
      annotations:
        linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        config.linkerd.io/proxy-require-identity-inbound: "true"
    spec:
      serviceAccountName: user-service
      containers:
        - name: user-service
          image: user-service:latest
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8084
          securityContext:
            runAsNonRoot: true
            readOnlyRootFilesystem: true
            allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
            capabilities:
              drop:
                - ALL
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: api-gateway
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: api-gateway
  ports:
    - port: 8080
      targetPort: 8080
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: order-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: order-service
  ports:
    - port: 8081
      targetPort: 8081
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: payment-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: payment-service
  ports:
    - port: 8082
      targetPort: 8082
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: inventory-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: inventory-service
  ports:
    - port: 8083
      targetPort: 8083
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: user-service
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  selector:
    app: user-service
  ports:
    - port: 8084
      targetPort: 8084
      protocol: TCP
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: default-deny-all
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  name: allow-mesh-traffic
  namespace: microservices
spec:
  podSelector: {}
  policyTypes:
    - Ingress
    - Egress
  ingress:
    - from:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
  egress:
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/inject: enabled
        - namespaceSelector:
            matchLabels:
              linkerd.io/is-control-plane: "true"
    - to:
        - namespaceSelector: {}
      ports:
        - port: 53
          protocol: UDP
        - port: 53
          protocol: TCP
